---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for KeyboardPet
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
---

**What problem would this solve?**
A clear description of the motivation — what are you trying to do?

**Describe the solution you'd like**
What you'd like to see happen.

**Alternatives considered**
Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

**Privacy note**
KeyboardPet records only physical key codes and never connects to the network.
Please keep suggestions within that constraint (no captured text, no telemetry).

**Additional context**
Mockups, references to other desktop pets, etc.
